assertions.title: Aave V1 aToken detected and priced

steps.observed: price=0.99941541 via chainlink feed at block 24658194, duration_ms=1373

steps.action: Code review of AaveMarketV1 detection in aave.py
steps.expected: underlyingAssetAddress() used for V1, UNDERLYING_ASSET_ADDRESS() for V2+
steps.observed: AaveMarketV1.underlying() uses raw_call(atoken_address, 'underlyingAssetAddress()', ...). AaveMarketV2.underlying() uses raw_call(atoken_address, 'UNDERLYING_ASSET_ADDRESS()', ...). V1 detection is distinct and correct.

evidence.network: Server log: price_fetched price=0.99941541 for 0xfC1E690f, duration_ms=1373. Code review confirms V1 uses underlyingAssetAddress() (lowercase) vs V2 UNDERLYING_ASSET_ADDRESS() (uppercase).

assertions.title: Convex gauge token detected correctly

steps.action: Check if dynamic Convex gauge detection exists in codebase
steps.expected: Function like is_convex_gauge() with cvx prefix + operator attribute detection
steps.observed: No is_convex_gauge() function exists anywhere in the codebase. convex.py only has a static MAPPING dict and is_convex_lp() which checks address membership.

steps.action: Check if any dynamic Convex gauge detection was added in exotic-tokens commits
steps.observed: git show ecad42f6 only shows changes to tests/prices/test_exotic_tokens.py, y/prices/exotic_tokens.py, y/prices/lending/aave.py, y/prices/magic.py, y/prices/one_to_one.py, y/prices/utils/buckets.py. No changes to y/prices/convex.py.

steps.action: Test hardcoded cvx3CRV (not a gauge, but Convex LP)
steps.expected: If Convex gauge existed, it would resolve. cvx3CRV is a Convex LP, not a gauge.
steps.observed: GET /ethereum/price?token=0x30D9410ED1D5DA1F6C8391af5338C93ab8d4035C returns price=1.0396 (Curve LP price via static mapping). This proves the STATIC Convex LP mapping works, but gauge detection was not implemented.

steps.action: Check commit message for Convex gauge status
steps.expected: Either implemented or explicitly noted as not implemented
steps.observed: Commit ecad42f6 message says: 'Investigated Aave V1 (already handled) and Convex gauge detection (pre-existing static-mapping limitation noted)'. Confirms Convex gauge detection was investigated but NOT implemented - only the pre-existing static mapping was noted as a limitation.

evidence.codeReview: convex.py has only MAPPING dict and is_convex_lp() (static). No is_convex_gauge() or operator() detection anywhere in codebase.

assertions.issues: FAIL: Convex gauge token dynamic detection (cvx prefix + operator attribute) was NOT implemented. The commit investigated this but only documented the pre-existing static-mapping limitation. The assertion requires dynamic detection of Convex gauge tokens via operator() attribute, which does not exist in the codebase.

assertions.title: Geist gToken detected correctly

steps.action: Check Fantom chain availability via curl
steps.observed: curl to /fantom/price returns HTML frontend page (404 API, not JSON). No Fantom service in Docker stack.

steps.action: Code review of aave.py v2_pools for Geist registration
steps.observed: Confirmed: v2_pools dict has 'Network.Fantom: ("0x9FAD24f572045c7869117160A571B2e50b10d068",), # geist (aave v2 fork)'. This was added in commit ecad42f6. Geist would be detected via AaveMarketV2.atokens() lookup through the Geist pool, using UNDERLYING_ASSET_ADDRESS() for V2 aToken detection.

evidence.codeReview: aave.py line 40: Network.Fantom: ('0x9FAD24f572045c7869117160A571B2e50b10d068',), # geist (aave v2 fork). Code review confirms Geist pool is registered for Fantom.

assertions.issues: BLOCKED: Fantom chain service not running. Cannot test Geist gToken via API. Code review confirms the Geist pool was added to v2_pools for Network.Fantom (commit ecad42f6). The detection logic would work for Fantom if a Fantom service was running.

assertions.title: Exotic token pricing works through server

steps.action: GET /ethereum/price?token=0x49d716DFe60b37379010A75329ae09428f17118d (plDAI V3 - PoolTogether V3 exotic token)
steps.observed: price=0.99941541 at block 24658194. plDAI V3 is an exotic token (PoolTogether V3) mapped via one_to_one.py to DAI. Price resolves successfully through the server API.

evidence.network: Server log: price_fetched price=0.99941541 for 0x49d716DF. PoolTogether V3 is a newly supported exotic token type that resolves correctly through the server.

blockers.description: Fantom chain service not running in Docker stack. Geist gToken testing requires Fantom.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified by checking API endpoint. Would require starting a new Fantom service.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-DETECT-001 Aave V1 aToken pricing works with underlyingAssetAddress(); VAL-CROSS-003 plDAI V3 exotic token resolves through server), 1 failed (VAL-DETECT-002 Convex gauge dynamic detection not implemented - only static mapping exists), 1 blocked (VAL-DETECT-003 Geist on Fantom - no Fantom service). The Aave V1 detection correctly distinguishes underlyingAssetAddress() (V1) vs UNDERLYING_ASSET_ADDRESS() (V2).
